item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "root='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B'
printf 'ALL_ENTRIES\\n'
find \""'$root" -mindepth 1 -print | sort
printf '"'FILES\\n'
find \""'$root" -type f -print | sort
printf '"'CACHE_LIKE_ENTRIES\\n'
find \""'$root" '"\\( -name '__pycache__' -o -name '*.pyc' -o -name '*.pyo' -o -name '.pytest_cache' -o -name '.mypy_cache' -o -name '.ruff_cache' -o -name '.DS_Store' -o -name '*~' -o -name '*.tmp' -o -name '*.cache' \\) -print | sort"
